objective: Implement distinct cards in the Backup Browser modal, fix scroll-to-top behavior, and update activity spinners to use Steam blue (#1a9fff).
design_decisions: Used a bounded div with a fixed maxHeight to act as the scroll container in the Backup Browser modal rather than DialogBody, allowing deterministic scroll to top.
Used a translucent white background for backup snapshot cards to keep the visual identity consistent with Steam OS while distinct from button backgrounds.
Switched white and unstyled update spinners to Steam blue (#1a9fff) for consistency with the rest of the application's spinner styling.
Replaced the static Check Now icon with a blue spinner when checking for updates.
results: All tests passed. Code review passed on first round with minor non-blocking UI tweaks, which were immediately addressed.
